case_title: CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., VS. FERNANDO QUINONEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585; CC 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 100129730) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, FERNANDO $9,930.70 PRINCIPAL, $310.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,240.70, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100129730) FILED BY ATTORNEY PATENAUDE, RAYMOND A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-29-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
